description: Style Note A hot favourite from the fcuk collection, this low rise pair of trunks allows free leg movement, while the label on the outer side of the waistband offers abrasion-free comfort. Product Details Low rise trunk offering a physique flattering Fit Luxurious cotton stretch for enhanced comfort and shape retention Low waist for added appeal Broad waistband with branding and pouch in the front Material and Care 94% cotton and 6% elastane Machine wash delicate inside out using a mild detergent Do not bleach or dry clean Hang dry in shade
